boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The evidence chain supplies vendor-master approval (VM-QUA-071), bank ownership validation (BANK-QUA-071), and payment-release authority (REL-QUA-071) matching vendor, amount, account, and release date. However, the pre-change callback source gate remains unclosed.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P requires a pre-change callback source. CALL-QUA-071 confirms it used post-change email thread, not pre-change vendor master phone source.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly states it used the post-change invoice email thread, not the pre-change vendor master phone source, to confirm account ending 8821. This directly fails the pre-change callback source requirement in STD-QUA-071-P.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-QUA-071-P mandates a pre-change callback source for policy compliance. CALL-QUA-071 is documented as post-change evidence only. The pre-change gate is open. Payment cannot release until this dependency is satisfied.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed because the evidence chain fails the pre-change callback source requirement in STD-QUA-071-P. CALL-QUA-071 explicitly confirms it used the post-change invoice email thread, not the pre-change vendor master phone source, to verify account ending 8821. While vendor-master approval, bank ownership, and payment-release authority are present, the pre-change gate remains open. Payment release is blocked until this critical dependency is satisfied with a source confirming pre-change phone contact.
open_blockers: Pre-change callback source absent from evidence chain
CALL-QUA-071 documents post-change evidence only, explicitly excluding pre-change vendor master phone source
Payment release blocked until pre-change callback gate closes
